vanilla_additions.comment: Setting this to False will disable all vanilla additions, making the enabled_vanilla_additions section ignored.  (Only Available on Fabric and NeoForge)

biomeswevegone:palm_trees.comment: Will add Palm Trees to minecraft:beach.

biomeswevegone:vanilla/flower_default.comment: Will add Flower Patch, Clover Patch, White Anemone, Pink Anemone, Orange Daisy, Horseweed and rose to minecraft:old_growth_pine_taiga, minecraft:old_growth_spruce_taiga, minecraft:windswept_hills, minecraft:windswept_gravelly_hills, minecraft:windswept_forest, minecraft:desert, minecraft:snowy_plains, minecraft:ice_spikes, minecraft:windswept_savanna, minecraft:forest, minecraft:old_growth_birch_forest, minecraft:birch_forest, minecraft:taiga, minecraft:snowy_taiga, minecraft:dark_forest.

biomeswevegone:vanilla/forest_flowers.comment: Will add Flower Patch, Clover Patch, Blue Rose Bush and Blue Berry Bushes to minecraft:forest, minecraft:dark_forest.

biomeswevegone:vanilla/flower_plains.comment: Will add Green/Cyan/Magenta/Purple/Yellow Tulips, Rose, Orange Daisy, Flower and Clover Patches to minecraft:plains, minecraft:sunflower_plains.

biomeswevegone:vanilla/flower_warm.comment: Will add Flower Patch, Clover Patch, White Anemone, Pink Anemone, Orange Daisy, Horseweed and rose to minecraft:sparse_jungle, minecraft:jungle, minecraft:bamboo_jungle, minecraft:savanna, minecraft:savanna_plateau.
